seo.title: {{appName}} - Vendor Management Dashboard | Device & Payment Platform
seo.description: Manage vending machines, laundry, parking, and lockers with {{appName}}. QR contactless payments, real-time monitoring, and multi-location management from one dashboard.

hero.title:
Manage Your Devices,
Accept Payments Effortlessly
hero.description: {{appName}} gives vendors a complete platform for managing laundry machines, parking spots, lockers, and vending machines with contactless QR payments.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Business
features.subtitle: From device setup to payment processing, {{appName}} handles it all.

deviceManagement.title: Device Management
deviceManagement.description: Configure and monitor washers, dryers, parking spots, lockers, and vending machines from a single dashboard.

qrPayments.title: QR Payments
qrPayments.description: Accept contactless payments via QR codes. Customers scan, pay, and go — no app download required.

orderTracking.title: Order Tracking
orderTracking.description: Monitor all transactions in real-time. Track order status, revenue, and payment history.

monitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Get live updates on device status via BLE and WebSocket connections. Know instantly when something needs attention.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Set up your first location in minutes. No hardware changes needed.
